Uses of Class
jline.lang.JobClass

  • Packages that use JobClass 
    Package Description
    jline.api
    This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
    jline.lang
    Classes to declare basic elements of a model
    jline.lang.nodes
    This package contains the classes used the specify Network objects
    jline.lang.sections
    Classes that model the individual sections that form a Network node
    jline.solvers
    This package contains the solver superclasses and related data structures
    jline.solvers.ctmc
    Classes that implement solution approaches based on Continuous-Time Markov Chain solution
    jline.solvers.fluid.odes
    Classes that generate the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) used in the Fluid solver
    jline.solvers.jmt
    Classes that rely on the Java Modelling Tools (JMT) suite solvers
    jline.solvers.ln
    Classes that define LINE's Layered Network (LN) solver
    jline.solvers.ssa.events  

    • Uses of JobClass in jline.api

      Method parameters in jline.api with type arguments of type JobClass 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Map<Integer,​Map<Integer,​Map<Integer,​Matrix>>> MAM.ph_reindex​(Map<Station,​Map<JobClass,​Map<Integer,​Matrix>>> PHs, NetworkStruct sn)
      Re-indexes a collection of phase-type distributions (PHs)

    • Uses of JobClass in jline.lang

      Subclasses of JobClass in jline.lang 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  ClosedClass
      Class where jobs perpetually loop without arriving or leaving (Closed class)
      class  OpenClass
      A class of jobs that arrives from the external world to the Network and, after completion, leaves it
      class  SelfLoopingClass
      Class of jobs that perpetually loop at a given station
